sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29765" key="dwdekh/rhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δωδεκ-ήρης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ους</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n29765.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a ship with twelve banks of oars</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1240.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Callix.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
